title: Compound Interest Calculator
desc: Free online compound interest calculator for investment and savings planning. Calculate future value with regular contributions, multiple compounding frequencies, and visual growth charts.

title: Crypto Profit Calculator
desc: Calculate your crypto investment profit, loss and ROI instantly with our free online calculator. Supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, altcoins, with trading fees and capital gains tax estimates.

title: Mortgage Calculator
desc: Our free online mortgage calculator helps you estimate monthly payments, total interest, and total home loan cost. Enter loan details and get a detailed 12-month amortization schedule instantly.

title: Retirement Calculator
desc: Instantly calculate your required retirement savings and track financial progress with our free online retirement calculator. Factor in contributions, returns, and inflation for accurate retirement planning.

title: Income Tax Calculator
desc: Estimate your 2024 US federal income tax instantly with our free online calculator. Compute taxable income, tax brackets, effective rate, and marginal rate for single, married, and head of household filers.

title: 401k Calculator
desc: Project your 401k retirement savings balance accurately with our free online calculator. Enter current savings, contributions, employer match, and expected returns to estimate annual withdrawal amounts.

title: Amortization Schedule Generator
desc: Generate an instant loan amortization schedule with monthly payment breakdowns using our free online tool. Enter loan amount, interest rate, and term to view principal, interest, and remaining balance for each payment.

title: APY Calculator
desc: Free online APY calculator to compute Annual Percentage Yield (APY) from APR and compounding frequency. Compare savings accounts, CDs, and crypto staking yields across various compounding periods.

title: Capital Gains Calculator
desc: Calculate capital gains tax on stocks, crypto, and real estate. Enter purchase price, sale price, holding period, income, and filing status to estimate US federal tax with short and long-term rates.

title: Debt to Income Ratio Calculator
desc: Calculate your debt-to-income (DTI) ratio instantly with our free online tool for mortgage and loan applications. Enter monthly income and debts to check eligibility with front-end and back-end ratios.

title: Future Value Calculator
desc: Calculate the future value of your investments with regular contributions using our free online FV calculator. Track compound growth, total contributions, and interest earned over your chosen time horizon.

title: Inflation Calculator
desc: Our free inflation calculator shows how inflation erodes purchasing power over time. Enter an amount and two years to see equivalent dollar values using historical US CPI data.

title: Mortgage Payoff Calculator
desc: Calculate your mortgage payoff with extra monthly payments to see interest savings and loan term reduction. Free online tool to compare original vs early payoff scenarios.

title: Mortgage Refinance Calculator
desc: Calculate if refinancing your mortgage makes financial sense. Compare current and new rates, closing costs, monthly savings, and break-even point with our free online refinance calculator.

title: Net Worth Calculator
desc: Calculate your personal net worth for free with our easy-to-use online calculator. List all assets and liabilities to get an instant breakdown of your financial health.

title: Present Value Calculator
desc: Calculate the present value of future sums with our free online PV calculator. Adjust discount rate, time period, and compounding frequency for accurate investment valuation and loan analysis.

title: Rent vs Buy Calculator
desc: Use our free rent vs buy calculator to compare renting vs buying a home. Factor in mortgage, taxes, appreciation, and opportunity cost for informed decisions.

title: Roth IRA Calculator
desc: Project your Roth IRA retirement balance, tax-free growth, and withdrawal income with our free online calculator. Enter annual contributions, expected return, and years to retirement.

title: Simple Interest Calculator
desc: Calculate simple interest on loans or investments with our free online tool. Enter principal, annual rate, and time to get interest earned and total amount instantly.

title: Tax Estimator
desc: Estimate your US federal income tax with our free online 2024 tax bracket calculator. Enter income, filing status, and deductions to see tax owed and take-home pay.
